title: petrina lignosa
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", petrina lignosa benefits include possessing antioxidation, antitumor, and antivirus properties, which may help prevent hormone-dependent diseases such as breast cancer, prostate cancer, and benign prostatic hyperplasia.
side_effects: Petrina lignosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its potent alkaloids and terpenes. Ingestion of the plant's extracts can also cause stomach problems, including vomiting and diarrhea, as the body tries to eliminate the toxic compounds. Additionally, prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in some individuals. If not handled correctly, petrina lignosa can also cause cardiovascular problems, including irregular heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations.
